nasb.text: He who restrains his words has knowledge, And he who has a cool spirit is a man of understanding.

esv.text: Whoever restrains his words has knowledge, and he who has a cool spirit is a man of understanding.

cnv.text: 有知識的約束自己的言語； 聰明人心平氣和。

ccb.text: 谨言慎行的有知识， 温和冷静的有悟性。

csbs.text: 约束自己言语的，明白知识； 灵里冷静的，是聪慧的人。
